name: medsafe-bot
description: Medication safety orchestration MCP server for Kakao AGENTIC PLAYER.

scripts.build:master: npm run build && node dist/scripts/build-master-db.js --input data/master.seed.json --aliases data/aliases.json --output data/master.sqlite
scripts.build:master:live: npm run build && node dist/scripts/build-live-master-inputs.js --output data/master.live.seed.json --aliases data/aliases.live.json && node dist/scripts/build-master-db.js --input data/master.live.seed.json --aliases data/aliases.live.json --output data/master.sqlite
